name: causal-halting
description: A Codex skill, prompt guard, DesignIR verifier, CHC-0/1/2/3/4/5 analyzers, trace adapters, corpus evaluator, repair certificates, and Markdown/Mermaid reporter for prediction-feedback loops.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze and refactor prediction-feedback loops in agent systems.
interface.longDescription: Causal Halting packages a Codex skill, low-cost UserPromptSubmit context guard, operational CHC-0/CHC-1/CHC-2 checker, CHC-3 process/session analyzer, CHC-4 temporal trace analyzer, CHC-5 probabilistic prediction analyzer, DesignIR-only verifier, deterministic trace analyzer, generic workflow/OpenTelemetry/LangGraph/Temporal/Airflow adapters, DesignIR corpus evaluator, repair certificates, proof-obligation repair verifier, Markdown/Mermaid reporter, and Lean proof-track skeleton for separating structural prediction-feedback cycles from ordinary semantic undecidability. Natural language must be interpreted by the LLM into DesignIR before deterministic analysis.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this agent loop with CHC-0.
Check this halting-style graph for feedback.
Analyze this agent trace for current-run prediction feedback.
Repair this causal_paradox into a safe orchestrator boundary.
Convert annotated OpenTelemetry, LangGraph, Temporal, or Airflow traces into CHC events.
Evaluate the DesignIR extraction corpus without parsing prose.
Render a CHC analysis as a Markdown/Mermaid report.
